creator: tremere@cainites.net
text:
Hi,

I've reinstalled py-openssl and some other py- ports like py-requests, but that didn't help.

What I failed to mention in my report is that I'm using LibreSSL instead of OpenSSL from base, using the WITH_OPENSSL_PORT=yes and OPENSSL_PORT=security/libressl in make.conf

I can try to rebuild using base openssl and see if that resolves the issue.

To be continued...
